name: Servcorp Limited
analysis: SRV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$6.7500, stop A$6.2667, target A$7.4381 (1.42:1) — then trail it.
